Aligning developers, designers, QA, and clients. Keeping everyone in sync without unnecessary meetings.

Quality Assurance
Structured QA workflows, test case coordination, and bug triage that maintains product standards through delivery.

Problem Solving
Problem Solving
Root cause analysis, solution scoping, and decision documentation. Turning ambiguous situations into clear action plans.
Portfolio

Selected Projects

Featured Project
01

Muslim Prayer & Qibla Direction App

Client: USA-based — Personal Islamic App — Full Ownership

A US-based client wanted a personal Muslim prayer app after struggling to find accurate Qibla direction from his location. I took full project ownership — from client briefing to final delivery — managing the entire development lifecycle.

The Problem
The app's Qibla compass was pointing in the wrong direction. The developer couldn't identify why. Root cause: the app was using generic coordinates instead of the client's actual GPS location.
My Role
Ran structured client meetings, documented 13+ issues in a tracked Google Sheet, prioritized by severity, communicated each fix to the dev team, and verified resolution.
The Outcome
All issues resolved. Qibla direction now accurately reflects real-time GPS. Client left a 5-star Fiverr review praising communication and deep understanding.
Full OwnershipClient CommunicationIssue TrackingQARoot Cause AnalysisMobile App PM

02
AR · EdTech · Mobile App

Bornolipi — AR Child Learning App

Client: Mansif Publication · Tiny R&D · Bangladesh

Bangladesh's first AR-based digital children's book — Bengali, English & Arabic for kids aged 3+. Managed full lifecycle from feature scoping to QA and delivery coordination.

Feature Scoping — Defined multilingual AR content, game mechanics, offline mode, parental tracking
QA Tracking — Tracked Critical & Major bugs across App + Backend with severity classification and screenshot evidence
User Flow Design — Mapped full flow: QR scan, book activation, lessons, AR experience, completion
Cross-team Coordination — Unity, Flutter, Firebase, ARCore, Vuforia, 3D design teams
AR TechnologyEdTechUnity + FlutterFirebaseQA Management
03
Barbershop · AI · Full Ownership · 1 Year+

Barbers Time — AI Barbershop Management Platform

Client: USA-based · 3 Platforms · Full Project Ownership

The most complex project I managed — a full barbershop ecosystem with three separate platforms for customers, shop owners, and barbers, plus AI that analyzes a haircut photo and recommends which nearby shop can replicate the style. Over 1 year of continuous coordination.

3 Platforms — Customer app, Shop Owner panel, Barber panel — all coordinated simultaneously
AI Feature PM — Coordinated AI haircut recognition: upload photo, get matched to nearest capable shop
Full QA Ownership — All screen issues tracked with video and screenshot evidence via Jam.dev, all marked Fixed
Figma Review — Reviewed 1,199+ design frames across all three user flows before dev handoff
AI Integration3 PlatformsFull OwnershipQAFigma ReviewiOS & Android

How I Work

My Process

01
Discover & Define
Understand project scope, stakeholder goals, and team constraints before anything else.
02
Plan & Structure
Break work into sprints, assign ownership, set milestones, and establish communication cadence.
03
Track & Unblock
Daily monitoring, proactive blocker removal, and real-time status visibility for all stakeholders.
04
QA & Validate
Structured quality checks, feedback integration, and issue triage before delivery.
05
Report & Improve
Post-project retrospectives, documented learnings, and reporting that improves every next cycle.
I Build My Own Tools

When PM tools weren't enough,
I built my own.

The Problem
Even with Jira and other PM tools, when handling a large volume of projects, things slip through the cracks. Deadlines get missed. Status updates go unnoticed.
My Decision
Instead of relying completely on existing tools, I built something lightweight, automated, and focused only on what I actually need — a personal assistant for project tracking.
The Result
Currently in testing with encouraging results. If something changes, I know instantly. If I miss something, it reminds me. My AI assistant works 24/7.
"Sometimes the best solutions are not the most complex ones. They are the ones built around your real problems."
